nasb.text: I have set the Lord continually before me; Because He is at my right hand, I will not be shaken.

esv.text: I have set the Lord always before me; because he is at my right hand, I shall not be shaken.

cnv.text: 我常常把耶和華擺在我面前， 因他在我右邊，我必不會動搖。

ccb.text: 我常以耶和华为念， 祂在我右边，我必不动摇。

csbs.text: 我总是以耶和华为念； 因为他在我的右边，我就不致动摇。
